methodology.title: What we track
methodology.subtitle: Every company is profiled across six dimensions — updated weekly by a single domain expert, not scraped or AI-hallucinated.
methodology.companyProfileItems: Name, URL, HQ location, country, founded|Estimated headcount|Known customers
methodology.marketPositionItems: Discipline (CAD, CAM, PLM, ERP...)|Lifecycle phase & workflow segment|Sector focus & industries served
methodology.technicalStackItems: Differentiation tags|Deployment model (Cloud, On-Prem, Edge, Hybrid...)|Operating model (SaaS, B2B, Direct Sales...)|Manufacturing type & integration points
methodology.financialsItems: Latest funding round & year|Total known funding level|Estimated revenue & market value
methodology.investmentContextItems: Investors & VCs|Investment list membership|Stripe customer & buyer maturity signals
methodology.competitiveScoringItems: Market Opportunity|Team & Execution|Funding Efficiency|Growth Metrics|Technical Differentiation|Industry Impact|Competitive Moat|Weighted score (0-10)
